title: BlockHardness Library
description: A library that allows you to add custom block breaking speeds to your blocks!
body:
# THIS IS NOT A STANDALONE PLUGIN!
#### It is made for developers, or used as a dependency for other projects.

## BlockHardness
The BlockHardness plugin enables developers to customize block-breaking speeds. It is an essential component of my [CustomDrops Plugin's](https://modrinth.com/plugin/customdrops) newest feature, which offers custom block-breaking speeds to region-based CustomDrops.

## Dependencies
This plugin requires [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) to work!

## Using BlockHardness
Check out the wiki [HERE](dev.vanixmc.com/blockhardness-library) to get started!

## Support
[Join The Discord](https://discord.com/invite/uRgQpyfcbT)
